articles.title: 'I wish this was AI': Parents outraged over abuse of toddlers at Bengaluru daycare
articles.summary: Shocking allegations of toddler abuse at a Bengaluru daycare, operating on Capgemini's campus, have ignited outrage among working parents. Demands for livestreamed activities and constant surveillance are surging.

articles.title: 68 women MPs in Japan had 2 toilets at parliament. After petition they have 4
articles.summary: Japan's parliament is set to add two more women's toilet cubicles following a petition by 58 female MPs highlighting the shortage. This move addresses the under-representation of women in politics, where they hold only 68 out of 465 lower house seats.

articles.title: ICAI CA Foundation May 2026 result today at 11 am; check scorecard, qualifying marks and steps to download
articles.summary: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) will announce the CA Foundation May 2026 result today at 11 am. Candidates can access their scorecards through the official websites using their registration number and roll number.

articles.title: RPSC RAS 2026 registration closes today for 607 posts; check direct link, eligibility, fees and exam schedule here
articles.summary: The Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) is closing the online application process today, July 3, 2026, for the Rajasthan State and Subordinate Services Combined Competitive Examination 2026. The recruitment will fill 607 vacancies, including 192 State Services and 415 Subordinate Services posts.

articles.title: Viksit Bharat Young Leaders Dialogue focuses on doctors' well-being, fitness and youth participation on National Doctors' Day
articles.summary: The United Doctors Front, in collaboration with the Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports, organised the Viksit Bharat Young Leaders Dialogue 2026 at Government Medical College, Amritsar, on National Doctors' Day. The roundtable focused on doctors' working conditions, mental health, fitness and work-life balance, while encouraging youth participation in nation-building.

articles.title: AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026: Last date today to apply for 1,484 Group B and C posts; apply here
articles.summary: AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026: The online application process for AIIMS CRE-5 Recruitment 2026 closes today at 5:00 PM for 1,484 Group B and Group C posts across participating AIIMS and other Central Government institutes. The recruitment notification was issued on June 13, 2026, by AIIMS New Delhi.
